name: property managers handling 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units, inefficient tenant screening causes delays in tenant placement. We provide streamlined tenant screening and maintenance scheduling instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient tenant screening and maintenance scheduling
